scripts.build:all: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.check: npm run build:all && node --check scripts/build-content.mjs && node --check dist/content.js && node --check dist/background.js && node --check dist/popup/popup.js && node --check dist-firefox/content.js && node --check dist-firefox/background.js && node --check dist-firefox/popup/popup.js
